zh.lifeSummary: Juliana De Swinburne是Nicholas de Swinburne和Alicia的女兒，於大約1258年出生在英國諾圖波藍德。她於大約1277年與Gilbert de Middleton在英國肯特哈特雷結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1334年7月16日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Juliana De Swinburne是Nicholas de Swinburne和Alicia的女儿，于大约1258年出生在英国諾圖波藍德。她于大约1277年与Gilbert de Middleton在英国肯特哈特雷结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1334年7月16日之前。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana De Swinburne was born about 1258, in Northumberland, England as the daughter of Nicholas de Swinburne and Alicia. She married Gilbert de Middleton about 1277, in Hartley, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died before 16 July 1334.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana De Swinburneは約1258年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでNicholas de SwinburneとAliciaの娘として生まれた。約1277年にイギリスケントハートリーでGilbert de Middletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1334年7月16日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana De Swinburne(은)는 대략 1258년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Nicholas de Swinburne(와)과 Alicia의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1277년 영국 켄트 하틀리에서 Gilbert de Middleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 7월 16일 이전 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Juliana De Swinburne родилась около 1258 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. Её родителей звали Nicholas de Swinburne и Alicia. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Middleton около 1277 г. в местности хартли, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла перед 16 июля 1334 г.
